printf '\033[2m📦 Provisioning tools...\033[0m\n' >&2; printf "=== yolo provisioning %s ===\n" "$(date "+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S%z")" >/workspace/.yolo/startup.log; (YOLO_BYPASS_SHIMS=1 sh -c '(mise trust --all --quiet 2>/dev/null || true) && if [ "${YOLO_STORE_PRUNE_OK:-0}" = "1" ]; then for _p in "$MISE_DATA_DIR"/installs/*/*; do if [ -L "$_p" ] && [ ! -e "$_p" ]; then rm -f -- "$_p" && echo "  ↳ pruned dangling store symlink: $_p" >&2; fi; done; fi && echo "  ↳ mise install" >&2 && mise install --quiet && echo "  ↳ mise upgrade" >&2 && { mise upgrade --yes >/tmp/yolo-mise-upgrade.out 2>&1; _urc=$?; grep -v "^mise WARN" /tmp/yolo-mise-upgrade.out | sed "s/^/    /" >&2; [ "$_urc" -eq 0 ]; } && echo "  ↳ bootstrap" >&2 && ~/.yolo-bootstrap.sh >&2 && ~/.yolo-venv-precreate.sh >&2') 2>&1 | tee -a /workspace/.yolo/startup.log >&2; _prc="${PIPESTATUS[0]}"; if [ "$_prc" -ne 0 ]; then printf "PROVISIONING FAILED (exit %s)\n" "$_prc" >>/workspace/.yolo/startup.log; printf "\033[1;31m✗ Provisioning failed (exit %s) — log: /workspace/.yolo/startup.log\033[0m\n" "$_prc" >&2; if [ -t 0 ] && [ "${YOLO_PROVISION_PROMPT:-1}" != "0" ]; then printf "Provisioning failed — continue anyway? [Y/n] " >&2; read -r _ans; case "$_ans" in [nN]*) exit "$_prc";; esac; fi; fi; . "$HOME/.config/yolo-user-env.sh" 2>/dev/null; eval "$(mise env -s bash)" 2>/dev/null; export PATH="$HOME/.yolo-shims:$PATH"; printf '\033[1;36m⚡ Executing: bash\033[0m\n' >&2; bash
